Label: Draft – Unassigned
Description: Shift created but no employee assigned yet.

Label: Draft – Assigned
Description: Employee assigned in draft mode; not yet visible to them.

Label: Published – Offered
Description: Shift sent to an employee as a direct offer; waiting for acceptance.

Label: Published – Confirmed
Description: Shift assigned and confirmed; visible on the employee's roster.

Label: Published – Bidding (Normal)
Description: Open shift available for bidding (>24h from start).

Label: Published – Bidding (Urgent)
Description: Open shift available for bidding (<24h from start).

Label: Published – Emergency Assigned
Description: Shift assigned within 4h of start (bypass bidding/offers).

Label: Published – Bidding Closed
Description: Bidding window closed without a winner select.

Label: Published – Trade Requested
Description: Employee has requested to trade this shift.

Label: Published – Trade Accepted
Description: Another employee has accepted the trade; waiting for manager approval.

Label: In Progress – Confirmed
Description: Employee has clocked in for a confirmed shift.

Label: In Progress – Emergency
Description: Employee has clocked in for an emergency assigned shift.

Label: Completed – Confirmed
Description: Shift finished correctly and clocked out (Confirmed).

Label: Completed – Emergency
Description: Shift finished correctly and clocked out (Emergency).

Label: Cancelled
Description: Shift has been cancelled and is no longer active.
